input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import paramiko
import sys

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

HOST = "192.168.2.104"
USER = "root"
PASS = "qwe123456"

cmd = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else r"""
uname -a
echo ---
uptime
echo ---
free -h
echo ---
df -h /
echo ---
ls /var/www 2>/dev/null
ls /opt 2>/dev/null
ls /home 2>/dev/null
echo ---
docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Image}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null
echo ---
ss -tlnp | head -50
echo ---
systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-pager | head -60
echo ---
find /var/www /opt /home /srv -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name 'package.json' -o -name 'composer.json' -o -name 'docker-compose*.yml' -o -name '*.env' \) 2>/dev/null | head -80
"""

c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(HOST, username=USER, password=PASS, timeout=20, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
stdin, stdout, stderr = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=120)
out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
print(out)
if err.strip():
    print("STDERR:", err)
c.close()

input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import paramiko
import sys
import base64

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

HOST = "192.168.2.104"
USER = "root"
PASS = "qwe123456"

if len(sys.argv) < 2:
    print("Usage: _crm_ssh.py <cmd|@file>")
    sys.exit(1)

arg = sys.argv[1]
if arg.startswith("@"):
    with open(arg[1:], "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        cmd = f.read()
else:
    cmd = arg

c = paramiko.SSHClient()
c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
c.connect(HOST, username=USER, password=PASS, timeout=20, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
# Avoid shell quoting issues: send via base64
b64 = base64.b64encode(cmd.encode("utf-8")).decode("ascii")
full = f"echo {b64} | base64 -d | bash"
stdin, stdout, stderr = c.exec_command(full, timeout=180)
out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
sys.stdout.write(out)
if err.strip():
    sys.stdout.write("\nSTDERR:\n" + err)
c.close()

echo '=== nginx conf.d ==='
ls -la /etc/nginx/conf.d/ 2>/dev/null
echo
for f in /etc/nginx/conf.d/*.conf; do
  echo "=== $f ==="
  cat "$f"
  echo
done
echo '=== html dirs ==='
ls -la /var/www/
du -sh /var/www/html* 2>/dev/null
echo '=== bitrix versions ==='
for d in /var/www/html /var/www/html1212 /var/www/html23423423423423; do
  echo "DIR $d"
  php -r "include '$d/bitrix/modules/main/classes/general/version.php'; echo SM_VERSION.' '.SM_VERSION_DATETIME.PHP_EOL;" 2>/dev/null
done
echo '=== document roots grep ==='
grep -R "root " /etc/nginx/conf.d/ 2>/dev/null | head -40
echo '=== disk top ==='
du -xh /var/www --max-depth=2 2>/dev/null | sort -hr | head -30
du -xh /var/lib/mysql --max-depth=1 2>/dev/null | sort -hr | head -20

Search CRM login credentials in docs

content.text: SSH через base64 завис — переключусь на SFTP и короткие команды. Параллельно найду логин в Bitrix.

input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import paramiko
import sys
import time

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

HOST = "192.168.2.104"
USER = "root"
PASS = "qwe123456"

def connect():
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(HOST, username=USER, password=PASS, timeout=20, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
    return c

def run(cmd, timeout=60):
    c = connect()
    try:
        stdin, stdout, stderr = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=timeout)
        # Wait for exit
        chan = stdout.channel
        deadline = time.time() + timeout
        while not chan.exit_status_ready():
            if time.time() > deadline:
                chan.close()
                raise TimeoutError(cmd[:80])
            time.sleep(0.1)
        out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
        err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
        code = chan.recv_exit_status()
        return code, out, err
    finally:
        c.close()

def run_script(script, timeout=120):
    c = connect()
    try:
        sftp = c.open_sftp()
        with sftp.file("/tmp/_crm_agent.sh", "w") as f:
            f.write("#!/bin/bash\nset -e\n" + script)
        sftp.chmod("/tmp/_crm_agent.sh", 0o755)
        sftp.close()
        stdin, stdout, stderr = c.exec_command("bash /tmp/_crm_agent.sh", timeout=timeout)
        chan = stdout.channel
        deadline = time.time() + timeout
        while not chan.exit_status_ready():
            if time.time() > deadline:
                chan.close()
                raise TimeoutError("script")
            time.sleep(0.1)
        out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
        err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
        return chan.recv_exit_status(), out, err
    finally:
        c.close()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    if len(sys.argv) > 1 and sys.argv[1] == "-f":
        with open(sys.argv[2], "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            script = f.read()
        code, out, err = run_script(script)
    else:
        cmd = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "hostname"
        code, out, err = run(cmd)
    sys.stdout.write(out)
    if err.strip():
        sys.stdout.write("\nSTDERR:\n" + err)
    sys.exit(code)

echo '=== nginx ==='
ls -la /etc/nginx/conf.d/
echo
grep -n 'root\|server_name\|listen' /etc/nginx/conf.d/*.conf 2>/dev/null | head -80
echo '=== html sizes (quick) ==='
du -sh /var/www/html /var/www/html1212 /var/www/html23423423423423 2>/dev/null
echo '=== bitrix cache sizes ==='
du -sh /var/www/html/bitrix/cache /var/www/html/bitrix/managed_cache /var/www/html/bitrix/stack_cache /var/www/html/upload 2>/dev/null
echo '=== settings cache ==='
php -r '
$f="/var/www/html/bitrix/.settings.php";
if(!file_exists($f)) $f="/var/www/html/.settings.php";
$a=include $f;
echo "cache: "; var_export($a["cache"] ?? null); echo "\n";
echo "connections: "; var_export(array_keys($a["connections"]["value"] ?? [])); echo "\n";
' 2>&1 | head -80
echo '=== db name ==='
grep -E "database|login|host|password" /var/www/html/bitrix/.settings.php 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo '=== php ==='
php -v | head -2
php -i 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'memory_limit|opcache.enable|max_execution' | head -20

set +e
echo '=== full 99-test-ip.conf ==='
cat /etc/nginx/conf.d/99-test-ip.conf
echo
echo '=== nginx includes / bitrix ==='
ls /etc/nginx/
find /etc/nginx -type f 2>/dev/null
echo
echo '=== bx nginx ==='
ls /etc/nginx/bx/ 2>/dev/null
ls /etc/httpd/bx/ 2>/dev/null
find /etc -name '*bitrix*' 2>/dev/null | head -40
echo
echo '=== apache ports ==='
grep -R 'Listen\|DocumentRoot\|VirtualHost' /etc/httpd/conf* /etc/httpd/bx* 2>/dev/null | head -60
echo
echo '=== which site active symlink ==='
ls -la /var/www/html /home/bitrix 2>/dev/null | head -20
readlink -f /var/www/html
echo
echo '=== disk waste copies ==='
du -sh /var/www/html /var/www/html1212 /var/www/html23423423423423 /var/lib/mysql 2>/dev/null
echo
echo '=== mysql dbs ==='
mysql -e 'SHOW DATABASES;' 2>/dev/null
echo
echo '=== .settings.php cache section ==='
python - <<'PY'
import re
p='/var/www/html/bitrix/.settings.php'
text=open(p,'r',encoding='utf-8',errors='replace').read()
# strip secrets partially for display
for key in ['cache','cache_flags','exception_handling','https_request']:
    m=re.search(r\"'%s'\\s*=>\\s*array\\s*\\((?:[^()]|\\([^()]*\\))*\\)\"%key, text, re.S)
    if m:
        print('---', key, '---')
        print(m.group(0)[:800])
# connections host/db only
m=re.search(r\"'default'\\s*=>\\s*array\\s*\\((?:[^()]|\\([^()]*\\))*\\)\", text, re.S)
if m:
    chunk=m.group(0)
    for line in chunk.splitlines():
        if any(k in line for k in ['host','database','login','type','className']):
            print(line)
PY
echo
echo '=== php ini ==='
php -i 2>/dev/null | egrep 'memory_limit|opcache\.(enable|memory)|max_execution_time|realpath_cache' | head -30
echo
echo '=== memcached ==='
echo stats | nc 127.0.0.1 11211 | head -20

set +e
echo '=== custom templates / portal ==='
ls /var/www/html/local/templates 2>/dev/null
ls /var/www/html/bitrix/templates 2>/dev/null | head
echo
echo '=== login template ==='
find /var/www/html/local /var/www/html/bitrix/templates -iname '*login*' 2>/dev/null | head -40
find /var/www/html -path '*/bitrix/modules' -prune -o -iname '*port*' -print 2>/dev/null | head -40
echo
echo '=== custom css/js under local ==='
find /var/www/html/local -type f \( -name '*.css' -o -name '*.scss' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.php' \) 2>/dev/null | head -80
du -sh /var/www/html/local 2>/dev/null
echo
echo '=== recent modified custom files ==='
find /var/www/html/local -type f -mtime -180 2>/dev/null | head -60
echo
echo '=== agents / cron ==='
crontab -l 2>/dev/null
crontab -u bitrix -l 2>/dev/null
ls /etc/cron.d/ 2>/dev/null
echo
echo '=== slow queries / mysql status ==='
mysql -e "SHOW GLOBAL STATUS LIKE 'Threads_connected'; SHOW GLOBAL STATUS LIKE 'Slow_queries'; SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'slow_query%'; SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'innodb_buffer_pool_size';" 2>/dev/null
echo
echo '=== bitrix users ==='
DB=$(python - <<'PY'
import re
t=open('/var/www/html/bitrix/.settings.php',encoding='utf-8',errors='replace').read()
m=re.search(r"'database'\\s*=>\\s*'([^']+)'", t)
print(m.group(1) if m else '')
PY
)
echo "DB=$DB"
mysql -N -e "SELECT ID,LOGIN,EMAIL,ACTIVE,LAST_LOGIN FROM b_user WHERE ACTIVE='Y' ORDER BY ID LIMIT 30;" "$DB" 2>/dev/null

content.text: Ставлю Redis и `php-pecl-redis6` под PHP 8.2, настрою память и проверю кэш Bitrix.

input.contents:
set -e
echo '=== install redis + php-pecl-redis6 ==='
yum -y install redis php-pecl-redis6

echo '=== configure redis for local cache ==='
cp -a /etc/redis.conf /etc/redis.conf.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)

# Bind localhost only, set memory policy for cache workload
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/etc/redis.conf')
text = p.read_text()
lines = text.splitlines(True)
out = []
seen = set()
replacements = {
    'bind': 'bind 127.0.0.1\n',
    'protected-mode': 'protected-mode yes\n',
    'port': 'port 6379\n',
    'maxmemory': 'maxmemory 512mb\n',
    'maxmemory-policy': 'maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru\n',
    'tcp-keepalive': 'tcp-keepalive 60\n',
    'timeout': 'timeout 0\n',
}
# Comment out default save directives for pure cache? Keep RDB light - Bitrix cache is fine volatile.
# We'll keep saves but ensure maxmemory-policy works.
for line in lines:
    stripped = line.lstrip()
    if stripped.startswith('#') or not stripped.strip():
        out.append(line)
        continue
    key = stripped.split(None, 1)[0]
    if key in replacements and key not in seen:
        out.append(replacements[key])
        seen.add(key)
    elif key in replacements:
        # skip duplicate keys we already wrote
        continue
    else:
        out.append(line)

for key, val in replacements.items():
    if key not in seen:
        out.append(val)

p.write_text(''.join(out))
print('redis.conf updated, keys:', sorted(seen))
PY

# Ensure supervised systemd
sed -i 's/^supervised .*/supervised systemd/' /etc/redis.conf || true
grep -E '^(bind|port|protected-mode|maxmemory|maxmemory-policy|supervised)' /etc/redis.conf

echo '=== enable & start ==='
systemctl enable redis
systemctl restart redis
systemctl is-active redis
redis-cli ping
redis-cli INFO server | head -15
redis-cli CONFIG GET maxmemory
redis-cli CONFIG GET maxmemory-policy

echo '=== restart php-fpm ==='
systemctl restart php-fpm
php -m | grep -i redis
php -r 'echo "redis ext ok\n"; $r=new Redis(); $r->connect("127.0.0.1",6379); $r->set("crm_probe","1",10); echo "get=".$r->get("crm_probe")."\n";'

echo '=== DONE install ==='

content.text: Пакеты встали — донастраиваю `redis.conf` без pathlib (на сервере Python 2).

input.contents:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import paramiko
import sys
import time

sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

HOST, USER, PASS = "192.168.2.104", "root", "qwe123456"

def connect():
    c = paramiko.SSHClient()
    c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
    c.connect(HOST, username=USER, password=PASS, timeout=20, allow_agent=False, look_for_keys=False)
    return c

def put(local_or_text, remote, is_text=False):
    c = connect()
    try:
        sftp = c.open_sftp()
        if is_text:
            with sftp.file(remote, "w") as f:
                f.write(local_or_text.replace("\r\n", "\n"))
        else:
            sftp.put(local_or_text, remote)
        sftp.close()
    finally:
        c.close()

def run(cmd, timeout=120):
    c = connect()
    try:
        _, stdout, stderr = c.exec_command(cmd, timeout=timeout)
        chan = stdout.channel
        deadline = time.time() + timeout
        while not chan.exit_status_ready():
            if time.time() > deadline:
                chan.close()
                raise TimeoutError(cmd)
            time.sleep(0.1)
        out = stdout.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
        err = stderr.read().decode("utf-8", "replace")
        code = chan.recv_exit_status()
        return code, out, err
    finally:
        c.close()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    mode = sys.argv[1]
    if mode == "put":
        put(sys.argv[2], sys.argv[3])
    elif mode == "puttext":
        put(open(sys.argv[2], encoding="utf-8").read(), sys.argv[3], is_text=True)
    elif mode == "run":
        code, out, err = run(sys.argv[2])
        sys.stdout.write(out)
        if err.strip():
            sys.stdout.write("\nSTDERR:\n" + err)
        sys.exit(code)
    else:
        print("put|puttext|run")
        sys.exit(1)

<?php
$_SERVER["DOCUMENT_ROOT"] = "/var/www/html";
$_SERVER["SERVER_NAME"] = "192.168.2.104";
define("NO_KEEP_STATISTIC", true);
define("NOT_CHECK_PERMISSIONS", true);
require "/var/www/html/bitrix/modules/main/include/prolog_before.php";

echo "php_redis_ext=" . (extension_loaded("redis") ? "YES" : "NO") . "\n";
echo "redis_ping=";
try {
    $r = new Redis();
    $r->connect("127.0.0.1", 6379, 1.5);
    echo $r->ping() ? "PONG" : "FAIL";
    echo "\n";
} catch (Throwable $e) {
    echo "ERR " . $e->getMessage() . "\n";
}

$cfg = \Bitrix\Main\Config\Configuration::getValue("cache");
echo "cache_cfg=" . json_encode($cfg) . "\n";

$cache = \Bitrix\Main\Data\Cache::createInstance();
$key = "agent_redis_test_" . time();
$miss = !$cache->initCache(120, $key, "/agent");
echo "first_miss_expected=" . ($miss ? "YES" : "NO") . "\n";
if ($cache->startDataCache()) {
    $cache->endDataCache(["hello" => "redis", "ts" => time()]);
    echo "wrote=YES\n";
}
$cache2 = \Bitrix\Main\Data\Cache::createInstance();
$hit = $cache2->initCache(120, $key, "/agent");
echo "second_hit=" . ($hit ? "YES" : "NO") . "\n";
if ($hit) {
    echo "vars=" . json_encode($cache2->getVars()) . "\n";
}

$r = new Redis();
$r->connect("127.0.0.1", 6379);
echo "dbsize=" . $r->dbSize() . "\n";
$keys = $r->keys("*");
echo "keys_count=" . count($keys) . "\n";
echo "sample=" . json_encode(array_slice($keys, 0, 8)) . "\n";

content.text:
Сделано нормально, не «как было».

**Что было:** в `.settings.php` стоял Redis, а на сервере не было ни `redis-server`, ни PHP-расширения — кэш фактически не работал.

**Что сделал:**
- поставил `redis` 3.2.12 + `php-pecl-redis6` (под PHP 8.2)
- Redis слушает только `127.0.0.1:6379`
- `maxmemory 512mb`, политика `allkeys-lru` (как кэш)
- автозапуск через systemd
- перезапустил `php-fpm`

**Проверка:** Bitrix пишет/читает кэш — hit есть, в Redis уже ~200 ключей.

Конфиг Bitrix трогать не пришлось — он и так был правильный, не хватало самого Redis.

Могу дальше: починить nginx по IP (сейчас обрезанный vhost) и подчистить диск / вёрстку.
